2605.09536.title: TAD: Temporal-Aware Trajectory Self-Distillation for Fast and Accurate Diffusion LLM
2605.09536.paper_summary: Diffusion large language models (dLLMs) offer a promising paradigm for parallel text generation, but in practice they face an accuracy-parallelism trade-off, where increasing tokens per forward (TPF) often degrades generation quality. Existing acceleration methods often gain speed at the cost of accuracy. To address this limitation, we propose TAD, a Temporal-Aware trajectory self-Distillation framework. During data construction, we condition a teacher model on both the prompt and the ground-truth response to generate decoding trajectories, recording the intermediate masked states throughout the process. Based on how many decoding steps remain before each masked token is revealed, we partition masked positions into near and distant subsets. For near tokens, we train the student with a hard cross-entropy loss using the teacher trajectory tokens as labels, encouraging confident predictions for tokens that are about to be decoded. For distant tokens, we apply a soft KL divergence loss between the teacher and student token distributions, providing softer supervision and preserving future planning knowledge. This temporal-aware partition naturally gives rise to two deployment configurations: a Quality model that prioritizes accuracy and a Speed model that favors more aggressive acceleration. Experiments show that TAD consistently improves the accuracy-parallelism trade-off. On LLaDA, it raises average accuracy from 46.2\% to 51.6\% with the Quality model and average AUP from 46.2 to 257.1 with the Speed model. Our code is available at: https://github.com/BHmingyang/TAD
2605.09536.paper_summary_zh: 擴散大型語言模型（dLLMs）提供了一種有前景的平行文本生成範式，但在實際應用中，它們面臨著準確性與平行性之間的權衡，增加每次前向傳播的標記數（TPF）往往會降低生成質量。現有的加速方法通常以準確性為代價來獲得速度。為了解決這一限制，我們提出了TAD，一種時間感知的軌跡自蒸餾框架。在數據構建過程中，我們將教師模型的條件設置在提示和真實響應上，以生成解碼軌跡，並在整個過程中記錄中間的遮蔽狀態。根據在每個遮蔽標記被揭示之前還剩下多少解碼步驟，我們將遮蔽位置劃分為近和遠的子集。對於近標記，我們使用教師軌跡標記作為標籤，通過硬交叉熵損失來訓練學生，鼓勵對即將解碼的標記進行自信的預測。對於遠標記，我們在教師和學生標記分佈之間應用軟KL散度損失，提供較柔和的監督並保留未來規劃知識。這種時間感知的劃分自然產生了兩種部署配置：一種是優先考慮準確性的質量模型，另一種是更偏向於激進加速的速度模型。實驗表明，TAD持續改善準確性與平行性之間的權衡。在LLaDA上，質量模型將平均準確率從46.2\%提高到51.6\%，速度模型則將平均AUP從46.2提高到257.1。我們的代碼可在以下鏈接獲得：https://github.com/BHmingyang/TAD
2605.09536.author: Haoyang Zhou et.al.
2605.09536.authors: Haoyang Zhou, Li Kong, Shijie Ren, Xiting Wang, Shuang Liang, Guowei Wang, Zhenxuan Pan
